audit_items.proof_trace: validateBlockDataColumnSidecars validates kzgProofs.length == kzgCommitments.length (L324) but does NOT validate column.length == kzgCommitments.length. cellIndices/cells arrays use column.length (L346-347) while commitments/proofs use kzgCommitments.length (L345,348), allowing mismatched array lengths to reach asyncVerifyCellKzgProofBatch (L353).
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends DataColumnSidecar via sync protocol (downloadByRoot/downloadByRange) where column.length != kzgCommitments.length. validateBlockDataColumnSidecars builds arrays with mismatched lengths and passes them to native KZG library, causing undefined behavior, incorrect verification, or crash.
